description: Pinned corpus: the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (Datenschutzgesetz, DSG / SR 235.1; French: Loi fédérale sur la protection des données, LPD), consolidated version in force 2023-09-01, fetched from the Fedlex filestore (official federal law portal). One law, multiple official language versions. The date pins the consolidation; if Fedlex publishes a newer consolidation the checksum changes and the corpus version is bumped deliberately.
law: SR 235.1 — Bundesgesetz über den Datenschutz (Datenschutzgesetz, DSG)
